span.p:
Fix apply-patches.js
Rebuild image
docker compose build agentshroud
docker compose up -d agentshroud

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Check gateway health
docker ps | grep gateway
Check 1Password service account
Wait for op-proxy retry (2 min)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Check openclaw.json validity\nRun openclaw doctor --fix\nRestart container

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
If session > 196K tokens:
Bot should auto-compact.
If reset persists: check logs
for compaction errors

span.p: 🔒 Security alert\n(blocked domain, HIGH MCP threat,\ncanary token triggered)
